question: How are swarm market predictions tracking 1 day after registration? Does the Iran de-escalation event validate or invalidate the geopolitical thesis cluster?
method: Fetch current prices for all 18 open predictions. Compare vs base prices. Assess impact of Trump postponing Iran strikes on prediction theses. Adjust confidences where thesis materially affected.
prediction: Most predictions too new to show signal. Geopolitical-dependent predictions (oil, energy, gold, VIX) will need confidence reductions on de-escalation.

results.market_event: Trump postpones Iran strikes 5 days — WTI -9%, BTC +5%, gold -4.5%, VIX -2.1%

SPY.note: Down 1.8% from prev close 659.80 despite de-escalation

results.key_signal: SPY declining despite de-escalation = structural bear (rising yields), not just geopolitical. Strengthens PRED-0001/PRED-0017 thesis via independence of drivers.

thesis_cluster_status.geopolitical_cluster: WEAKENED — Iran pause undermines oil/energy/VIX predictions
thesis_cluster_status.structural_cluster: INTACT — CAPE, yields, rotation signals unchanged by Iran event
thesis_cluster_status.safe_haven_cluster: MIXED — gold tactically hit, BTC up, TLT flat

verdict: TOO EARLY — predictions 1 day old. But Iran de-escalation provides first thesis-discriminating event: geopolitical predictions weakened, structural predictions strengthened. The fact that SPY fell on a 'good news' day is the strongest early signal.
